name: SignalTerrain
mission: Map, navigation, geology, and earth science capabilities — shared modules across the platform, not a standalone product.
portfolioNote: SignalTerrain concepts become shared map, coordinate, and earth-science modules (already used in ForageCast heat maps) plus navigation lessons in Fieldry and the dashboard.
learnToday: How contour lines describe drainage and aspect — poetry you can walk
Reading a schematic terrain map as an educational estimate, not a GIS guarantee
Bearing, humility, and turnaround planning before summit fever
Why maps belong beside lessons, not as a separate app door
comingSoon: Geology and weather cross-links on the regional dashboard
Honest offline-stub documentation — no fake live telemetry

preview.title: The observatory deck
preview.description: Horizon, contour, and signal reading are platform capabilities — woven into ForageCast terrain bands and future Fieldry route notes — not a separate destination.
